programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A dejected Jethalal plans to take his family to Lonavala when Babita does not invite him to her birthday party.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya excitedly rush to get the perfect gift for Babita's birthday party. Babita and Iyer's grand party begins in full swing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Daya reach right on time for Babita's bash and learn that they failed to get the perfect gift for her. Champaklal attends the party and feels horrified to find Daya in a dress.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali tells Taarak that she gives him healthy food so that he can stay fit. Anjali puts Taarak on a diet after she learns that he has gained 4lbs.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal leaves early from the office to enjoy the delicious food prepared by Daya. Taarak tries to make Anjali give him tasty food by getting her a gift.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal eagerly awaits his mouth-watering dinner, but he feels bad when Daya tells him that Taarak has to diet.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal desperately tries to avoid having Taarak over for dinner. He eventually ends up faking a stomach ache and lands in more trouble than before.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi suggests boiled food for Jethalal and tells Daya to be more careful with his diet for now. The Gadas meet up with famous dancers.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu wants a new season cricket bat. Later, he tries to come up with different and unique ways to convince his parents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu learns that Bhide is not allowing Sonu to go out and play. Later, an argument takes place between Jethalal and Bhide.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Pyaarelal decides to change his name back to Popatlal and talks to Sapna's father. Sapna starts to feel close to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Sapna and Popatlal enjoy their time together and find themselves getting along well. Popatlal learns that he has another scheduled meeting with Kalpana.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal has a private conversation with Kalpana, but he finds himself in a predicament when both women agree to marry him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal puts himself in a difficult position after agreeing to both Kalpana and Sapna's marriage proposals.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal is pushed by Champaklal to make a final choice for his marriage, making him decide to turn to Tapu Sena for advice on his dilemma.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal meets both families again to come to a decision, but Sapna's family make him feel unexpectedly uncomfortable.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal lies to Sapna about having to attend to a work emergency, but his real intention is to visit Kalpana instead.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gopu Sena from 7 Star Society challenges Tapu Sena that their Ganesh Chaturthi event will win the award. Meanwhile, Bhide disagrees to provide funds to Tapu Sena for this event.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After a bank refuses a loan request, Tapu Sena approaches a moneylender to facilitate their event. Later, they have to pay a high price for it.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena finally unveils the Ganpati decorations, and everyone is breathless by the setup. Meanwhile, They also have a second surprise to reveal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rita is impressed and delighted by Tapu Sena's Ganesh Chaturthi event. She experiences the magic in this event and decides to promote it through her news channel.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All members of Gokuldham society pay their respects to Lord Ganesha. Later, everyone is excited to receive delightful gifts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Kids from the 7 Star Society are shocked to see the number of visitors in Gokuldham society.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The Ganesh Chaturthi event in Gokuldham becomes a crowd-puller, and everyone pitches in to handle the long queues of visitors.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham society wins the best Ganesh Chaturthi event award. Everyone is excited to hear the news.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena is shocked when they find the donated money collected at the Ganpati event is empty. They decide to catch the thief by checking the CCTV footage and soon find something suspicious.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena realises the folly of spending money that could use to help someone who is in need. Later, they apologise to everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is happy with the success of Tapu Sena's Ganpati decorations. They are also pleased when Tapu Sena gives them each a memorable gift as a token of thanks.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is upset and angry with everyone in society. Later, Madhavi asks him about the reason. He tells her that all members try to make fun of him for being the secretary.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All of the members go on a trip to visit Mumbai's famous Shree Siddhivinayak Ganapati Temple. Meanwhile, Bhide announces a surprise that he plans for everyone. He also apologises for the day before.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members of the society return home to another surprise from Bhide. However, a new problem suddenly arises.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic arrives when Jethalal loses his house key, and everyone in the society helps him find the key. All of the members are tired, but they still cannot find the keys.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The members feel restless when Bhide is unable to find a key maker. Later, Taarak says that they should go and search for the bus.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The men of the Gokuldham Society set out to look for the key, but the rest of the members feel restless.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: When the men return without the key, everyone is disappointed. They eventually find the key from somewhere unexpected.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Seeing his mother's tears, Tapu plots revenge on his father. This family conflict embroils Jethalal in chaos, leaving him worried about Tapu's behaviour.
